query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email, u.role, c.id as clientId, c.name as clientName, c.whatsappPhone
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'alvarorios79@hotmail.com';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email, u.role, c.id as clientId, c.name as clientName, c.whatsappPhone
FROM users u
